rules.name: after_payment
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 6 AND (7 or 8 or 5) AND 9
rules.label: after payment

decisions.description: check if RT developer name is Institutes
decisions.name: is_RT_name_Institutes
decisions.label: is RT name Institutes

rules.name: PreSurgery_site_20
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND 4 AND 5 AND not(6 AND 7) AND not(8 AND 9) AND not(10 AND 11) AND not(12 AND 13) AND not(14 AND 15)
rules.label: PreSurgery site 20

rules.name: Whatsapp_sent
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND 3 AND (4 or 8) AND 5 AND 6 AND 7
rules.label: Whatsapp sent

rules.name: WhatsApp_18015
rules.conditionLogic: 1 AND 2 AND (3 or 4 or 5 or 6 or 7)
rules.label: WhatsApp

Flow.description: this flow will trigger the flow 'logic to send institute sms' to send sms - Added new condition in "after payment" scenario - monday #1870605237 AM: 30122025- 2556291813- add medical procedure check for - 992694 (add new template: remote_presurgery_meeting) AM: 30122025- 2150382332- added message preventing action (hate this flow. i did not create it! blame someone else) AM: 29012026- 2514907331- added medical procedure code 992698 to "remote_presurgery_meeting"
Flow.label: send sms for institute appointment
